# Submitting plugins
:::tip Note
**When uploading, please name your plugin in the format below (plugins generated by the [Cloud-PE Plugin Helper](https://p0.cloud-pe.cn/Cloud-PE%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6/CE-%E6%8F%92%E4%BB%B6%E5%88%B6%E4%BD%9C%E5%B7%A5%E5%85%B7/CEMake.exe) already use this format by default):**
```
[Category]Name_Version_Author(you)_Description.ce

e.g.:
[安全维护]维护工具_1.0.1_dddffgg_Cloud-PE官方推出的PE维护工具包.ce
```
Make sure the plugin is: not a duplicate (a newer version is fine), uses relative paths or environment variables, is harmless, has a filename under 80 characters, and loads correctly in Cloud-PE.

After uploading, your plugin will be reviewed; if approved it is added to the plugin market.
:::

:::warning Available categories:
运行环境、远程控制、游戏娱乐、硬件检测、系统工具、文件工具、网络浏览、输入法、视频音乐、实用工具、社交通讯、上传下载、驱动程序、其他软件、教育学习、磁盘工具、编程开发、备份还原、办公编辑、安全维护
:::

:::danger Warning
Plugins that contain an archive password will not pass review. Please confirm your plugin has no archive password before uploading.
:::

## Upload
<h3>Self-service upload</h3>

Upload via the link below:

[Upload link](https://ruzex-my.sharepoint.cn/:f:/g/personal/ruz-ex_ruzex_partner_onmschina_cn1/EsN6CdOwNQ9LorisWO9AgRYBl1K3AqUnsLxlLKW7GJbobw?e=T7XTxi)

## Review result
If your plugin can be found on the [Cloud-PE download site](https://files.cloud-pe.cn/) or in the Cloud Plugin Market / Cloud-PE One, it has passed review. If it can't be found, it is still under review or was not approved (if it is still not in the Cloud Plugin Market after 3 months, it was not approved — please re-check the [submission requirements](#submitting-plugins)).
